description: Create migration ee/server/migrations/<ts>_create_teams_notification_deliveries.cjs that defines the table with all PRD columns and primary key (tenant, delivery_id).
Add UNIQUE (tenant, idempotency_key) constraint to teams_notification_deliveries to enable ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.
Add CHECK constraint enforcing teams_notification_deliveries.status IN ('skipped','sent','delivered','failed').
Add CHECK constraint enforcing teams_notification_deliveries.error_code is NULL or in the documented enum set.
Add indexes (tenant, internal_notification_id) and (tenant, status, created_at DESC) on teams_notification_deliveries.
Declare teams_notification_deliveries as PARTITION BY RANGE (created_at); create child partitions for current month + next 2 months.
Run create_distributed_table('teams_notification_deliveries','tenant', colocate_with => 'teams_integrations') when Citus is present; warn-and-skip otherwise.
Create PL/pgSQL function cleanup_teams_notification_deliveries(retention_interval) that drops partitions older than now() - retention_interval. Default 90 days.
Create migration ee/server/migrations/<ts>_create_teams_audit_events.cjs with all PRD columns and PK (tenant, event_id).
Add CHECK constraints enforcing teams_audit_events.surface IN ('bot','message_extension','quick_action','tab') and result_status IN ('success','failure').
Add CHECK constraint enforcing teams_audit_events.action_id IN ('assign_ticket','add_note','reply_to_contact','log_time','approval_response','create_ticket_from_message','update_from_message').
Add indexes (tenant, actor_user_id, created_at DESC) and (tenant, target_type, target_id) on teams_audit_events.
Run create_distributed_table on teams_audit_events colocated with teams_integrations.
Create PL/pgSQL function cleanup_teams_audit_events(retention_interval) (default 365 days). Audit table is NOT partitioned in this PR — function uses range delete.
Create migration ee/server/migrations/<ts>_create_teams_conversation_references.cjs with PRD columns and PK (tenant, microsoft_user_id, conversation_id).
Run create_distributed_table on teams_conversation_references colocated with teams_integrations.
Implement writeTeamsDeliveryRow(input) helper in ee/packages/microsoft-teams/src/lib/notifications/teamsDeliveryRecorder.ts. Computes idempotency_key (SHA-256), inserts with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.
Instrument deliverTeamsNotificationImpl() to call writeTeamsDeliveryRow() on 'skipped' return path with appropriate skip reason mapped to error_code enum.
Instrument deliverTeamsNotificationImpl() to call writeTeamsDeliveryRow() on 'delivered' return path with provider_message_id.
Instrument deliverTeamsNotificationImpl() to call writeTeamsDeliveryRow() on 'failed' return path with error_code mapped to enum (graph_throttled, graph_unauthorized, etc.).
Map Graph HTTP status codes to error_code enum values: 401/403 -> graph_unauthorized; 404 -> graph_not_found; 429 -> graph_throttled; 5xx -> graph_server_error.

Map non-Graph skip reasons to error_code enum: missing addon -> addon_inactive; integration inactive -> integration_inactive; user not mapped -> user_not_mapped; missing package metadata -> package_misconfigured.
Capture provider_request_id from Graph response 'request-id' header when present and persist on delivery row.
Truncate error_message to 1KB before persisting to prevent leaking long customer/Graph payloads.
Implement writeTeamsAuditEvent(input) helper in ee/packages/microsoft-teams/src/lib/teams/actions/teamsAuditRecorder.ts. Computes payload_hash (SHA-256 of canonicalized JSON), inserts row.
Canonicalize action payload via stable JSON.stringify with sorted keys before hashing so retried invokes produce the same payload_hash.
Instrument assign_ticket action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument add_note action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument reply_to_contact action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument log_time action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument approval_response action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument create_ticket_from_message action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Instrument update_from_message action in teamsActionRegistry.ts to call writeTeamsAuditEvent on success and on caught failure.
Resolve actor_user_id (PSA user) and microsoft_user_id (aadObjectId) from Teams turn context at audit recording time.
Map each action's source (bot turn / compose extension / quick action task module) to the correct surface enum value when recording audit events.
Implement upsertTeamsConversationReference(turnContext) helper that writes/updates teams_conversation_references on every inbound bot activity.
Call upsertTeamsConversationReference from the bot adapter's activity handler entry point so all inbound activities trigger capture.

Implement listTeamsDeliveries server action in teamsObservabilityActions.ts using withAuth + hasPermission('teams_integration','read'). Supports status/category/since filters, cursor pagination, limit cap 200.

Implement listTeamsAuditEvents server action in teamsObservabilityActions.ts using withAuth + hasPermission('teams_integration','read'). Supports surface/action_id/actor/result filters, cursor pagination.
Cursor encoding: opaque base64 of (created_at, id) tuple so pagination is stable under inserts. Decode/validate cursor server-side; reject malformed.
Add 'teams_integration:read' permission to permission seeder if absent. Verify by grepping existing permissions before adding.

CRITICAL: Add 'teams_notification_deliveries', 'teams_audit_events', 'teams_conversation_references' to TENANT_TABLES_DELETION_ORDER in ee/temporal-workflows/src/activities/tenant-deletion-activities.ts BEFORE 'teams_integrations' entry.
Verify partitioned table deletion behavior: DELETE FROM teams_notification_deliveries WHERE tenant=? prunes across all partitions (tested in tenant-deletion activity).
Update Microsoft profile bindings comment block in tenant-deletion-activities.ts to reflect the three new tables.
Rebuild @alga-psa/microsoft-teams package (tsup -> dist) so server picks up new exports and instrumentation.
Grep services/workflow-worker for imports of deliverTeamsNotificationImpl / teamsActionRegistry. If present, document worker rebuild requirement in plan deployment notes.
Export TeamsDeliveryRow and TeamsAuditEventRow TypeScript types from the package public API surface for the server actions to consume.
Document the new tables, instrumentation helpers, and tenant-deletion registration in a one-line CHANGELOG entry (internal — no marketing).

Validate Citus partition + distribution interaction with a smoke query in the migration: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_dist_partition WHERE logicalrelid='teams_notification_deliveries'::regclass. Log result.
Mirror migrations into ee/server/migrations/citus/ ONLY if there is Citus-specific divergence (e.g., distribution must happen outside a transaction). Otherwise keep single CE-compatible migration.
